use_cases: E-commerce add-to-cart buttons with a rustic wooden aesthetic
Purchase confirmation buttons in marketplace applications
Interactive elements for handcrafted or artisanal product stores
Call-to-action buttons in any web application needing a warm tactile feel
Shopping cart interface elements with 3D depth effects
ai_summary: A wooden-styled cart button featuring skeuomorphic design that simulates a physical wooden button with 3D perspective transforms, warm gradient wood tones from wheat to tan, and layered inset and drop shadows for realistic depth. The button includes smooth hover lift animations and press feedback states, making it ideal for e-commerce purchase flows requiring a warm, handcrafted aesthetic.
